objective: Construct a deterministic engine-neutral candidate from declared Forge inputs bound to the verified H2 neutral humanoid profile, without external execution, hidden mutation, or authority escalation.
next_action: Audit semantic-construction and representation-contract integration points, then define the smallest typed H3 construction input, deterministic candidate output, replay receipt, resource bounds, and adversarial no-executable/no-network/no-hidden-mutation fixtures while retaining the H2 structural and authority limits.
research_gate: Use repository-owned H2 profile, semantic-construction contract, and deterministic fixtures first. External tools, model acquisition, runtime research, and executable content remain out of scope.
authority_lane: Owner-authorized implementation of the approved master plan. H3 may produce only deterministic engine-neutral candidate data; no perceptual approval, production promotion, engine selection, external execution, or protected-Kernel mutation.
context_health: Green after H2 focused and complete Forge gates. Forge capture is current and heartbeat remains paused; cold-start scanning of the large local session corpus remains slow.
unresolved_risks: Semantic-construction recipes and the H2 profile use different identity domains and need an explicit one-way binding.
A generator contract could accidentally duplicate P6 recipe authority or imply production geometry.
Replay and cache identity must bind all declared inputs without admitting locators, executables, plugins, or network content.
Surface topology, skinning, deformation, visual convergence, engine integration, and production promotion remain outside H3.
Forge capture cold start currently rescans roughly 113 MB of session logs and can take several minutes.
evidence_requirements: explicit P6 recipe and H2 profile fingerprint bindings
strict declared construction inputs with no executable, path, plugin, or network authority
deterministic candidate bytes, identity, replay, and bounded resource counts
no hidden filesystem, process, network, clock, randomness, or protected-Kernel mutation
H1/H2 lineage retained without importing recovered content
adversarial input drift, replay drift, unknown-field, exhaustion, and overclaim fixtures
verification_plan: inspect semantic-construction and H2 profile code and contracts
record identity, authority, replay, resource, and mutation-boundary gaps
implement the smallest capability-free H3 input/output adapter without duplicating P6 or H2 ownership
bind P6 and H2 fingerprints without recovered content or external locators
add deterministic replay and adversarial authority-negative tests
run modularity, focused, and complete Forge gates
advance automatically to H4 only after H3 is verified
resume_after: Continue automatically after progress updates. Ask the owner only for a genuine authority boundary or irreducible design choice.
verification_receipts: H1 archive fixity and duplicate provenance verified
H2 fixed profile, scene, and H1-suite fingerprints retained
Forge context launch discovery repaired and tested
transition: R0 accepted -> H1 intake verified -> H2 neutral representation verified -> H3 deterministic generation executing
